title: Tom’s Pride
description: Tom teaches Franky and Iceburg that a shipwright must stand proudly behind the ships they build.
scene: Across pages 15, 16, 17, 18, this part follows Blueno, Iceburg, Franky, Tom, Spandam. Tom teaches Franky and Iceburg that a shipwright must stand proudly behind the ships they build.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Let's get to the big question with

dialogue.speaker: Kokoro
dialogue.text: I've been in the grand line!!

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: Let me take it apart for you.

summary: Tom teaches Franky and Iceburg that a shipwright must stand proudly behind the ships they build.
